input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8879 [Automation] native-image run fails for org.conscrypt:conscrypt-openjdk-uber:1.4.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Conscrypt uses JNI and extracts/loads a bundled native library at runtime, so failures may appear as Native Image metadata or native-access issues rather than missing test setup.

The reported failure text, `could not find field address`, points toward missing or stale reachability metadata for Conscrypt internals rather than a missing dependency, Docker service, environment variable, or system property.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is needed: org.conscrypt:conscrypt-openjdk-uber:1.4.1 is a self-contained uber JAR with no Maven dependencies, bundles its native libraries, and can be meaningfully exercised with local/in-memory JCA and JSSE usage rather than external services.
